ideation: This animation sequence will mimic a dog playfully begging or anticipating a treat.  The animation will focus on the front paws, which we will simulate using the robot's hands. The movement will be a combination of raising and lowering the hands in a slightly exaggerated manner, with a slight tilt of the wrists to simulate the 'puppy dog eyes' expression. The sequence will be short, consisting of three frames to capture the essence of the playful anticipation.

frames.beat: arms perk up, eager for a treat
both hands lift higher, a hopeful plea
arms return to a ready, expectant pose
